alex.title: {child} and Alex's Critter Friends
alex.scene_1_title: A Sunny Day in Apple Park
alex.scene_1: On a golden morning in Apple Park, {child} wandered along the meadow path when Alex appeared from behind a big oak tree, grinning wide. "Want to explore with me, {child}?" Alex asked. "I just found something wiggly under this log!"
alex.scene_1_caption: {child} and Alex explore the meadow in Apple Park
alex.scene_2: Together, {child} and Alex peeked under rocks and leaves, discovering ladybugs, a shy snail, and a fuzzy caterpillar. Alex introduced each one like an old friend. "Every critter has a story," Alex whispered. {child} giggled as a butterfly landed on their finger.
alex.scene_2_caption: Alex shows {child} tiny critter friends in the grass
alex.scene_3: As the sun dipped low, Alex sat beside {child} on a soft blanket. "Tomorrow we'll find even more wonders," Alex said. {child} yawned happily, already dreaming of the next Apple Park adventure.
alex.scene_3_caption: {child} and Alex rest under the Apple Park trees at dusk
alex.moral: Wonder is everywhere when you look with curious, kind eyes.

ella.title: Ella's Tea Party for {child}
ella.scene_1: Ella spread a checkered blanket beneath the apple trees and set out tiny cups for everyone. "{child}!" she called with a bright smile. "I saved you the best seat at my Apple Park tea party!"
ella.scene_1_caption: Ella welcomes {child} to a tea party in Apple Park
ella.scene_2: Luke pushed {child} on the swing, Gwen hummed a tune, and Paloma shared her cookies. Ella made sure everyone felt included. "The best parties," Ella said, "are the ones where nobody feels left out." {child} clapped with joy.
ella.scene_2_caption: All the Apple Park Kids gather for Ella's tea party
ella.scene_3: As stars appeared, Ella tucked {child} in with a cozy blanket from the picnic. "Sleepovers are my favorite," she whispered. "Especially with friends like you, {child}."
ella.scene_3_caption: Ella and {child} snuggle up after the tea party
ella.moral: The more friends you welcome, the warmer the world feels.

grady.title: Grady to the Rescue for {child}
grady.scene_1: In Apple Park, {child} sat on a bench feeling a little glum. Grady noticed right away — he always does. "Hey {child}," Grady said gently, sitting down. "Want to talk about it? I'm here."
grady.scene_1_caption: Grady notices {child} needs a friend in Apple Park
grady.scene_2: Grady told {child} his funniest joke, then helped them build a tower of smooth stones by the pond. With each stone, {child} felt a little lighter. "See?" Grady grinned. "Bad days don't last when friends stick together."
grady.scene_2_caption: Grady and {child} build a stone tower by the pond
grady.scene_3: At bedtime, Grady gave {child} a high-five. "Remember, {child} — whenever you need me, Grady to the rescue!" {child} smiled the biggest smile of the day.
grady.scene_3_caption: Grady gives {child} a reassuring high-five at sunset
grady.moral: Helping a friend feel better is the bravest thing you can do.

gwen.title: Gwen's Lullaby for {child}
gwen.scene_1: Walking through Apple Park, {child} heard a sweet hum drifting from the garden. It was Gwen, sitting on a tree stump, making up a melody. "Oh, {child}!" Gwen said. "Want to help me finish this song?"
gwen.scene_1_caption: Gwen hums a tune for {child} in the Apple Park garden
gwen.scene_2: Gwen and {child} clapped rhythms on their knees and sang about fireflies and apple blossoms. Even the birds seemed to listen. "You have a beautiful voice, {child}," Gwen said. "Music is magic we make together."
gwen.scene_2_caption: {child} and Gwen sing among the apple blossoms
gwen.scene_3: As the moon rose over Apple Park, Gwen sang a soft lullaby just for {child}. The melody floated like a warm blanket. "Sweet dreams, {child}," Gwen whispered. "I'll hum you to sleep."
gwen.scene_3_caption: Gwen sings a gentle lullaby to {child} under the moon
gwen.moral: Your voice is a gift — sing it proudly, even in a whisper.

levi.title: {child} and Levi's Sandcastle Kingdom
levi.scene_1: At the Apple Park sandbox, Levi was drawing plans with a stick. "{child}!" he called excitedly. "I'm building the most extraordinary sandcastle ever — with bridges, moats, and everything! Want to be my architect partner?"
levi.scene_1_caption: Levi shows {child} his sandcastle plans in Apple Park
levi.scene_2: Levi and {child} packed wet sand into tall towers and carved a tiny bridge. When a wave almost knocked it down, Levi smiled. "That's okay — we rebuild even better!" Together they added a flag on top. {child} cheered.
levi.scene_2_caption: Levi and {child} build an extraordinary sandcastle
levi.scene_3: As the sun set, Levi and {child} admired their creation. "Every great builder starts with imagination," Levi said. {child} closed their eyes, dreaming of kingdoms made of sand and stars.
levi.scene_3_caption: Levi and {child} admire their sandcastle at golden hour
levi.moral: With patience and imagination, you can build anything wonderful.

luke.title: Luke's Gentle Push for {child}
luke.scene_1: The Apple Park playground was buzzing with laughter. Luke spotted {child} near the swings and waved. "Hey {child}! Want a push? I give the best ones — not too high, just right!"
luke.scene_1_caption: Luke invites {child} to the Apple Park playground
luke.scene_2: Luke pushed {child} on the swing with gentle, steady pushes. Then they took turns on the merry-go-round, spinning slowly under the apple trees. "The best part of playing," Luke said, "is doing it together."
luke.scene_2_caption: Luke pushes {child} on the swing at Apple Park
luke.scene_3: When playtime ended, Luke walked {child} to a shady bench. "Rest is part of fun too," he said softly. {child} leaned against Luke's shoulder, happy and sleepy.
luke.scene_3_caption: Luke and {child} rest together after a day of play
luke.moral: Kindness is the gentlest superpower of all.

mia.title: Mia's Peek-a-Boo Surprise for {child}
mia.scene_1: Walking through Apple Park, {child} heard a tiny giggle from behind a tree. "Peek-a-boo!" shouted Mia, popping out with a grin. "Got you, {child}! Want to play my favorite game?"
mia.scene_1_caption: Mia surprises {child} with peek-a-boo in Apple Park
mia.scene_2: Mia and {child} took turns hiding behind bushes, benches, and apple barrels. Each surprise brought fresh giggles. "Life is more fun with surprises," Mia said, covering her eyes. "Okay {child}, peek-a-boo — where are YOU?"
mia.scene_2_caption: {child} and Mia play peek-a-boo among the apple trees
mia.scene_3: At bedtime, Mia tucked a little note under {child}'s pillow that said "You're my favorite friend." {child} found it and squealed with delight. "Surprise!" Mia whispered from the doorway, smiling.
mia.scene_3_caption: Mia leaves a sweet surprise for {child} at bedtime
mia.moral: The best surprises are the ones that make someone feel loved.

paloma.title: Paloma Shares with {child}
paloma.scene_1: Under the big apple tree in Apple Park, Paloma held a shiny red apple. "{child}, want to share?" she asked warmly. "Everything tastes better when you split it with a friend."
paloma.scene_1_caption: Paloma offers to share an apple with {child}
paloma.scene_2: At the playground, kids lined up for the slide. Paloma showed {child} how taking turns works. "You go first, then me, then Gwen," she explained patiently. {child} learned that waiting feels easier with a kind friend beside you.
paloma.scene_2_caption: Paloma teaches {child} about taking turns at the playground
paloma.scene_3: Paloma gave {child} half her blanket at naptime. "Sharing isn't just about toys," she said softly. "It's about caring." {child} drifted off feeling warm and safe.
paloma.scene_3_caption: Paloma shares her blanket with {child} at naptime
paloma.moral: Sharing what you have makes every heart a little bigger.

wren.title: Wren's Story Time for {child}
wren.scene_1: In a sunny nook of Apple Park, Wren sat with a stack of picture books. "{child}!" she called softly. "Story time is starting — and I saved the comfiest cushion just for you."
wren.scene_1_caption: Wren invites {child} to story time in Apple Park
wren.scene_2: Wren read about dragons and daisies, and {child} added their own twists to every tale. "You're a wonderful storyteller, {child}," Wren said. "The best stories are the ones we tell together."
wren.scene_2_caption: Wren and {child} read stories together on a cozy cushion
wren.scene_3: As eyelids grew heavy, Wren tucked {child} in and whispered, "Tomorrow we'll write a brand-new story — one that stars you, {child}." The stars twinkled approval through the window.
wren.scene_3_caption: Wren tucks {child} in after a cozy story time
wren.moral: Every night is a new page — and you are the hero of your story.
